Grid.TextBlock:
1. (S) SITUATION: After intense combat operations in June, negotiations have been ongoing between NATO and the WP. However, a recent breakdown has seen a powerful USSR SAG get underway steaming towards the GIUK Gap with the intent to breakout. The USS Eisenhower battle group, reinforced by Standing NATO Maritime Group One, has been tasked to locate and destroy the SAG to drive the WP back to the negotiating table.
2. (S) MISSION: 2.1 Locate and destroy the USSR SAG.
3. (S) EXECUTION: 3.1 EMCON policy at your discretion. 3.2 Once enemy SAG is located, destroy using any means.
4. (S) ENEMY OOB: 4.1 KIROV Surface Action Group 4.1.1 1x Kirov 4.1.2 1x Slava 4.1.3 1x Sovremennyy 4.1.4 1x Kresta 4.1.5 1x Udaloy 4.2 Suspected AGI trawlers in the area 4.3 Soviet Naval Aviation (may sortie in support) 4.4 Kosmos 1932 RORSAT will pass over at 0028Z, USAF attempting shootdown
5. (S) FRIENDLY OOB: 5.1 TF 65.7 (Eisenhower Battle Group) 5.1.1 USS Dwight D. Eisenhower CVN-69 5.1.2 USS New Jersey BB-62 5.1.3 USS Valley Forge CG-50 5.1.4 USS Dale CG-19 5.1.5 FGS Molders D-186 5.1.6 USS Underwood FFG-36 5.1.7 USS Thomas C. Hart FF-1092 5.1.8 HNoMS Stavanger F303
6. (S) INTEL ASSESSMENT: 6.1 Assess with medium confidence that USSR attack submarines will be escorting the KIROV SAG. 6.2 Assess with high confidence that USSR aircraft will support the KIROV SAG. 6.3 Assess with high confidence that weather is clearing up in the next 2 hours.
